zh: 12.1. 初等微分学

text: 12.2. Differential Calculus in Normed Spaces

zh: 12.2. 赋范空间中的微分学

html: 12.2.1. Normed spaces
zh: 12.2.1. 赋范空间

text: 12.2.2. Continuous linear maps
html: 12.2.2. Continuous linear maps
zh: 12.2.2. 连续线性映射

text: 12.2.4. Differentiability
html: 12.2.4. Differentiability
zh: 12.2.4. 可微性

text: We now consider the formalization of notions from analysis , starting with differentiation in this chapter and turning integration and measure theory in the next. In Section 12.1 , we stick with the setting of functions from the real numbers to the real numbers, which is familiar from any introductory calculus class. In Section 12.2 , we then consider the notion of a derivative in a much broader setting.
html: We now consider the formalization of notions from analysis, starting with differentiation in this chapter and turning integration and measure theory in the next. In Section 12.1, we stick with the setting of functions from the real numbers to the real numbers, which is familiar from any introductory calculus class. In Section 12.2, we then consider the notion of a derivative in a much broader setting.
zh: 现在考虑分析学中若干概念的形式化：本章从微分开始，下一章转向积分与测度论。在Section 12.1中，我们限于从实数到实数的函数这一设置，这是任何初等微积分课程都熟悉的情形。然后在Section 12.2中，我们将在更广泛的设置下考察导数概念。

text: Let f be a function from the reals to the reals. There is a difference between talking about the derivative of f at a single point and talking about the derivative function. In Mathlib, the first notion is represented as follows.
html: Let f be a function from the reals to the reals. There is a difference between talking about the derivative of f at a single point and talking about the derivative function. In Mathlib, the first notion is represented as follows.
zh: 设 f 是从实数到实数的函数。谈论 f 在单个点处的导数，与谈论导函数，是不同的事情。在 Mathlib 中，第一种概念表示如下。

text: We can also express that f is differentiable at a point without specifying its derivative there by writing DifferentiableAt ℝ . We specify ℝ explicitly because in a slightly more general context, when talking about functions from ℂ to ℂ , we want to be able to distinguish between being differentiable in the real sense and being differentiable in the sense of the complex derivative.
html: We can also express that f is differentiable at a point without specifying its derivative there by writing DifferentiableAt ℝ. We specify ℝ explicitly because in a slightly more general context, when talking about functions from ℂ to ℂ, we want to be able to distinguish between being differentiable in the real sense and being differentiable in the sense of the complex derivative.
zh: 也可以通过写 DifferentiableAt ℝ 来表达 f 在一点处可微，而不指定它在该点的导数。这里显式指定 ℝ，是因为在稍微更一般的语境中，当讨论从 ℂ 到 ℂ 的函数时，我们希望能够区分实意义下可微与复导数意义下可微。

text: It would be inconvenient to have to provide a proof of differentiability every time we want to refer to a derivative. So Mathlib provides a function deriv f : ℝ → ℝ that is defined for any function f : ℝ → ℝ but is defined to take the value 0 at any point where f is not differentiable.
html: It would be inconvenient to have to provide a proof of differentiability every time we want to refer to a derivative. So Mathlib provides a function deriv f : ℝ → ℝ that is defined for any function f : ℝ → ℝ but is defined to take the value 0 at any point where f is not differentiable.
zh: 如果每次想引用导数时都必须提供可微性的证明，会很不方便。因此 Mathlib 提供函数 deriv f : ℝ → ℝ；它对任意函数 f : ℝ → ℝ 都有定义，并规定在 f 不可微的任何点处取值为 0。

text: Of course there are many lemmas about deriv that do require differentiability assumptions. For instance, you should think about a counterexample to the next lemma without the differentiability assumptions.
html: Of course there are many lemmas about deriv that do require differentiability assumptions. For instance, you should think about a counterexample to the next lemma without the differentiability assumptions.
zh: 当然，关于 deriv 的许多引理确实需要可微性假设。例如，对于下一个引理，如果没有可微性假设，请思考一个反例。

text: Interestingly, however, there are statements that can avoid differentiability assumptions by taking advantage of the fact that the value of deriv defaults to zero when the function is not differentiable. So making sense of the following statement requires knowing the precise definition of deriv .
html: Interestingly, however, there are statements that can avoid differentiability assumptions by taking advantage of the fact that the value of deriv defaults to zero when the function is not differentiable. So making sense of the following statement requires knowing the precise definition of deriv.
zh: 不过有趣的是，有些陈述可以利用函数不可微时 deriv 的值默认等于零这一事实，从而避免可微性假设。因此，要理解下面陈述的意义，需要知道 deriv 的精确定义。

text: We can even state Rolle’s theorem without any differentiability assumptions, which seems even weirder.
html: We can even state Rolle’s theorem without any differentiability assumptions, which seems even weirder.
zh: 甚至可以在没有任何可微性假设的情况下陈述罗尔定理，这看起来更奇怪。

text: Of course, this trick does not work for the general mean value theorem.
html: Of course, this trick does not work for the general mean value theorem.
zh: 当然，这个技巧不适用于一般的中值定理。

text: Lean can automatically compute some simple derivatives using the simp tactic.
html: Lean can automatically compute some simple derivatives using the simp tactic.
zh: Lean 可以使用 simp 策略自动计算一些简单导数。

text: Differentiation can be generalized beyond ℝ using the notion of a normed vector space , which encapsulates both direction and distance. We start with the notion of a normed group , which is an additive commutative group equipped with a real-valued norm function satisfying the following conditions.
html: Differentiation can be generalized beyond ℝ using the notion of a normed vector space, which encapsulates both direction and distance. We start with the notion of a normed group, which is an additive commutative group equipped with a real-valued norm function satisfying the following conditions.
zh: 借助赋范向量空间概念，可以把微分推广到 ℝ 之外；赋范向量空间同时封装了方向和距离。我们从赋范群概念开始，它是一个加法交换群，并配备取实数值的范数函数，满足下列条件。

text: Every normed space is a metric space with distance function \(d(x, y) = \| x - y \|\) , and hence it is also a topological space. Lean and Mathlib know this.
html: Every normed space is a metric space with distance function \(d(x, y) = \| x - y \|\), and hence it is also a topological space. Lean and Mathlib know this.
zh: 每个赋范空间都是以 \(d(x, y) = \| x - y \|\) 为距离函数的度量空间，因此也都是拓扑空间。Lean 与 Mathlib 都知道这一点。

text: In order to use the notion of a norm with concepts from linear algebra, we add the assumption NormedSpace ℝ E on top of NormedAddGroup E . This stipulates that E is a vector space over ℝ and that scalar multiplication satisfies the following condition.
html: In order to use the notion of a norm with concepts from linear algebra, we add the assumption NormedSpace ℝ E on top of NormedAddGroup E. This stipulates that E is a vector space over ℝ and that scalar multiplication satisfies the following condition.
zh: 为了把范数概念与线性代数中的概念结合使用，我们在 NormedAddGroup E 之上添加假设 NormedSpace ℝ E。这规定 E 是 ℝ 上的向量空间，并且标量乘法满足下列条件。

text: A complete normed space is known as a Banach space . Every finite-dimensional vector space is complete.
html: A complete normed space is known as a Banach space. Every finite-dimensional vector space is complete.
zh: 完备赋范空间称为Banach 空间。每个有限维向量空间都是完备的。

text: In all the previous examples, we used the real numbers as the base field. More generally, we can make sense of calculus with a vector space over any nontrivially normed field . These are fields that are equipped with a real-valued norm that is multiplicative and has the property that not every element has norm zero or one (equivalently, there is an element whose norm is bigger than one).
html: In all the previous examples, we used the real numbers as the base field. More generally, we can make sense of calculus with a vector space over any nontrivially normed field. These are fields that are equipped with a real-valued norm that is multiplicative and has the property that not every element has norm zero or one (equivalently, there is an element whose norm is bigger than one).
zh: 在前面所有例子中，我们都使用实数作为基域。更一般地，对任何非平凡赋范域上的向量空间，也可以讨论微积分。所谓非平凡赋范域，是指配备取实数值范数的域，该范数满足乘法性，并且并非每个元素的范数都是零或一（等价地，存在某个元素的范数大于一）。

text: A finite-dimensional vector space over a nontrivially normed field is complete as long as the field itself is complete.
html: A finite-dimensional vector space over a nontrivially normed field is complete as long as the field itself is complete.
zh: 非平凡赋范域上的有限维向量空间是完备的，只要该域本身是完备的。

text: We now turn to the morphisms in the category of normed spaces, namely, continuous linear maps. In Mathlib, the type of 𝕜 -linear continuous maps between normed spaces E and F is written E →L[𝕜] F . They are implemented as bundled maps , which means that an element of this type is a structure that that includes the function itself and the properties of being linear and continuous. Lean will insert a coercion so that a continuous linear map can be treated as a function.
html: We now turn to the morphisms in the category of normed spaces, namely, continuous linear maps. In Mathlib, the type of 𝕜-linear continuous maps between normed spaces E and F is written E →L[𝕜] F. They are implemented as bundled maps, which means that an element of this type is a structure that that includes the function itself and the properties of being linear and continuous. Lean will insert a coercion so that a continuous linear map can be treated as a function.
zh: 现在转向赋范空间范畴中的态射，即连续线性映射。在 Mathlib 中，赋范空间 E 与 F 之间的 𝕜-线性连续映射类型写作 E →L[𝕜] F。它们实现为打包映射，也就是说，此类型的元素是一个结构，包含函数本身以及线性和连续性的性质。Lean 会插入强制转换，使连续线性映射可以作为函数使用。

text: Continuous linear maps have an operator norm that is characterized by the following properties.
html: Continuous linear maps have an operator norm that is characterized by the following properties.
zh: 连续线性映射具有算子范数，其由下列性质刻画。

text: There is also a notion of bundled continuous linear isomorphism . Their type of such isomorphisms is E ≃L[𝕜] F .
html: There is also a notion of bundled continuous linear isomorphism. Their type of such isomorphisms is E ≃L[𝕜] F.
zh: 还有打包连续线性同构的概念。这类同构的类型是 E ≃L[𝕜] F。

text: As a challenging exercise, you can prove the Banach-Steinhaus theorem, also known as the Uniform Boundedness Principle. The principle states that a family of continuous linear maps from a Banach space into a normed space is pointwise bounded, then the norms of these linear maps are uniformly bounded. The main ingredient is Baire’s theorem nonempty_interior_of_iUnion_of_closed . (You proved a version of this in the topology chapter.) Minor ingredients include continuous_linear_map.opNorm_le_of_shell , interior_subset and interior_iInter_subset and isClosed_le .
html: As a challenging exercise, you can prove the Banach-Steinhaus theorem, also known as the Uniform Boundedness Principle. The principle states that a family of continuous linear maps from a Banach space into a normed space is pointwise bounded, then the norms of these linear maps are uniformly bounded. The main ingredient is Baire’s theorem nonempty_interior_of_iUnion_of_closed. (You proved a version of this in the topology chapter.) Minor ingredients include continuous_linear_map.opNorm_le_of_shell, interior_subset and interior_iInter_subset and isClosed_le.
zh: 作为一个有挑战性的练习，你可以证明巴拿赫-施泰因豪斯定理，也称为一致有界性原理。该原理断言：从巴拿赫空间到赋范空间的一族连续线性映射若逐点有界，则这些线性映射的范数一致有界。主要成分是贝尔定理 nonempty_interior_of_iUnion_of_closed。（你已经在拓扑章节中证明过它的一个版本。）次要成分包括 continuous_linear_map.opNorm_le_of_shell、interior_subset、interior_iInter_subset 和 isClosed_le。

text: Defining differentiability also requires asymptotic comparisons. Mathlib has an extensive library covering the big O and little o relations, whose definitions are shown below. Opening the asymptotics locale allows us to use the corresponding notation. Here we will only use little o to define differentiability.
html: Defining differentiability also requires asymptotic comparisons. Mathlib has an extensive library covering the big O and little o relations, whose definitions are shown below. Opening the asymptotics locale allows us to use the corresponding notation. Here we will only use little o to define differentiability.
zh: 定义可微性还需要渐近比较。Mathlib 有一个覆盖大 O 与小 o 关系的丰富库；下面给出了这些关系的定义。打开 asymptotics locale 之后，就可以使用相应记号。这里我们只使用小 o 来定义可微性。

text: We are now ready to discuss differentiable functions between normed spaces. In analogy the elementary one-dimensional, Mathlib defines a predicate HasFDerivAt and a function fderiv . Here the letter “f” stands for Fréchet .
html: We are now ready to discuss differentiable functions between normed spaces. In analogy the elementary one-dimensional, Mathlib defines a predicate HasFDerivAt and a function fderiv. Here the letter “f” stands for Fréchet.
zh: 现在可以讨论赋范空间之间的可微函数。类似初等一维情形，Mathlib 定义了谓词 HasFDerivAt 和函数 fderiv。这里字母“f”代表Fréchet。

text: We also have iterated derivatives that take values in the type of multilinear maps E [×n]→L[𝕜] F , and we have continuously differential functions. The type ℕ∞ is ℕ with an additional element ∞ that is bigger than every natural number. So \(\mathcal{C}^\infty\) functions are functions f that satisfy ContDiff 𝕜 ⊤ f .
html: We also have iterated derivatives that take values in the type of multilinear maps E [×n]→L[𝕜] F, and we have continuously differential functions. The type ℕ∞ is ℕ with an additional element ∞ that is bigger than every natural number. So \(\mathcal{C}^\infty\) functions are functions f that satisfy ContDiff 𝕜 ⊤ f.
zh: 还有迭代导数，其取值于多线性映射类型 E [×n]→L[𝕜] F；也有连续可微函数。类型 ℕ∞ 是在 ℕ 中额外加入一个大于每个自然数的元素 ∞ 得到的。因此，\(\mathcal{C}^\infty\) 函数就是满足 ContDiff 𝕜 ⊤ f 的函数 f。

text: The differentiability parameter in ContDiff can also take value ω : WithTop ℕ∞ to denote analytic functions.
html: The differentiability parameter in ContDiff can also take value ω : WithTop ℕ∞ to denote analytic functions.
zh: ContDiff 中的可微性参数也可以取值 ω : WithTop ℕ∞，用来表示解析函数。

text: There is a stricter notion of differentiability called HasStrictFDerivAt , which is used in the statement of the inverse function theorem and the statement of the implicit function theorem, both of which are in Mathlib. Over ℝ or ℂ , continuously differentiable functions are strictly differentiable.
html: There is a stricter notion of differentiability called HasStrictFDerivAt, which is used in the statement of the inverse function theorem and the statement of the implicit function theorem, both of which are in Mathlib. Over ℝ or ℂ, continuously differentiable functions are strictly differentiable.
zh: 还有一个更严格的可微性概念，称为 HasStrictFDerivAt；它用于反函数定理和隐函数定理的陈述，这两个定理都在 Mathlib 中。对 ℝ 或 ℂ 而言，连续可微函数都是严格可微的。

text: The local inverse theorem is stated using an operation that produces an inverse function from a function and the assumptions that the function is strictly differentiable at a point a and that its derivative is an isomorphism.
html: The local inverse theorem is stated using an operation that produces an inverse function from a function and the assumptions that the function is strictly differentiable at a point a and that its derivative is an isomorphism.
zh: 局部反函数定理使用一个操作来陈述：该操作从一个函数以及“该函数在点 a 处严格可微且其导数为同构”的假设出发，产生一个反函数。

text: The first example below gets this local inverse. The next ones state that it is indeed a local inverse from the left and from the right, and that it is strictly differentiable.
html: The first example below gets this local inverse. The next ones state that it is indeed a local inverse from the left and from the right, and that it is strictly differentiable.
zh: 下面第一个例子取得这个局部反函数。接下来的例子陈述它确实是左、右两侧的局部反函数，并且它严格可微。

text: This has been only a quick tour of the differential calculus in Mathlib. The library contains many variations that we have not discussed. For example, you may want to use one-sided derivatives in the one-dimensional setting. The means to do so are found in Mathlib in a more general context; see HasFDerivWithinAt or the even more general HasFDerivAtFilter .
html: This has been only a quick tour of the differential calculus in Mathlib. The library contains many variations that we have not discussed. For example, you may want to use one-sided derivatives in the one-dimensional setting. The means to do so are found in Mathlib in a more general context; see HasFDerivWithinAt or the even more general HasFDerivAtFilter.
zh: 这只是对 Mathlib 中微分学内容的快速巡览。库中还包含许多这里没有讨论的变体。例如，在一维设置中，你可能想使用单侧导数。Mathlib 在更一般的语境中提供了相应手段；参见 HasFDerivWithinAt 或更一般的 HasFDerivAtFilter。
